privileged_info_summary: Verified all target coordinates (35.198 deg / 0.6143 rad lat, -111.651 deg / -1.9487 rad lon) against explicit prompt instructions and mathematical conversion. Verified the Julian Date bounds (2425990 - 2426015) successfully encompass the required dates of Jan 23 and Jan 29, 1930 (JD ~2426000 and ~2426006). Verified the output screenshot and exhibit note paths against setup and export scripts, and confirmed the expected display flags accurately reflect the user's instructions.
